query._note: `query`'s ENGINE DEFAULTS are unchanged from legacy (--format hits = flat ranked list, --hybrid off = vector-only). The skill opts into `--format evidence` (fidelity-tagged {evidence, coverage}) and `--hybrid` (vector+BM25) EXPLICITLY — it does not rely on defaults, so existing `query` callers are unaffected. `query` also exposes --rerank/--candidate-k/--content-types/--page-dedup, unused by the skill.

_default_table_name_note: engine DEFAULT_TABLE_NAME constant; NOT the skill name. Operator-config only.

legacy.note: verify still ships but the retriever skill does not depend on it; not gated by doctor.py.
